name: Kinigawissin (Assiniwi's Vegetable Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the diced bell pepper, cucumber, and shallots. Cook until they are tender.
3. Stir in the cooked green peas, corn, crushed tomatoes, mashed Jerusalem artichokes (or potatoes), and grilled bannock.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Continue stirring and heating until everything is hot and well combined.
